Training Name: Training 6 — Access Governance, Risk & Supplier Oversight
Learning Outcome: Understand how Controlled Documents are identified and tracked in the Controlled Document Jira board; explain the document ID format (two-character department prefix + document type digit + three-digit unique number)

Training Name: Training 6 — Access Governance, Risk & Supplier Oversight
Learning Outcome: Apply data classification (Public, Internal, Confidential, Restricted) to Controlled Documents using the Data Classification SOP; document the classification in the Document Control Change Log

Training Name: Training 6 — Access Governance, Risk & Supplier Oversight
Learning Outcome: Ensure Controlled Documents include required sections: document information (ID, version, effective date, classification), Purpose, Scope, Roles and Responsibilities, References, main section, Training, and Review

Training Name: Training 6 — Access Governance, Risk & Supplier Oversight
Learning Outcome: Distinguish major versions (significant content/scope changes) from minor versions (typos, link updates, formatting); understand that effective Controlled Documents are immutable; changes create a new draft

Module: F - Governance, risk, and compliance awareness
Learning Outcome: Submit document change requests through the Compliance Jira board; understand the workflow from draft distribution through feedback, approval, and distribution of the controlled copy

Module: F - Governance, risk, and compliance awareness
Learning Outcome: Understand that Controlled Document locations use security groups in Google Workspace, Confluence, and Jira to manage access

Training Name: Training 6 — Access Governance, Risk & Supplier Oversight
Learning Outcome: Understand that Management and the Responsible Person determine training requirements for each Controlled Document; the Document Controller coordinates training planning

Module: F - Governance, risk, and compliance awareness
Learning Outcome: Know that all Controlled Documents are reviewed annually by default; documents with different schedules note this in their Review section
